title: Jury Finds Rally Organizers Responsible for Charlottesville Violence
content: Jurors found the main organizers of the deadly far-right rally in Charlottesville, Va., in 2017 liable under state law, awarding more than $25 million in damages, but deadlocked on federal conspiracy charges.
en_title: Jury Finds Rally Organizers Responsible for Charlottesville Violence
en_content: Jurors found the main organizers of the deadly far-right rally in Charlottesville, Va., in 2017 liable under state law, awarding more than $25 million in damages, but deadlocked on federal conspiracy charges.
